game.name: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt - Game of the Year Edition
game.installRoot: C:\Program Files (x86)\GOG Galaxy\Games\The Witcher 3 Wild Hunt GOTY

mods.name: Community Patch - Shared Imports
mods.notes: Required by W3EE Redux Next-Gen builds. Installs modSharedImports under mods.

mods.name: W3EE Redux
mods.notes: Full Next-Gen build includes traditional EE add-ons: More Quick Slots, Friendly HUD, All Quest Objectives on Map, and Immersive Camera.

postInstallConfig.loadOrderNote: If using Script Merger or mods.settings, modReduxW3EE must have priority over modW3EE.
